# normalMatrix

**Instance Property**

The matrix used to transform normal coordinates from world space to eye space.

## Declaration

```swift
var normalMatrix: GLKMatrix3 { get }
```

## Discussion

The normal matrix is derived from the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKEffectPropertyTransform/modelviewMatrix] property and is automatically calculated when needed.

## Configuring Modelview Properties

- **modelviewMatrix**: The matrix used to transform position coordinates from world space to eye space.
